name: Apple Spice Custard Cake (from Borden)
recipeIngredient: 1 package 18 1/4 oz. spice apple cake mix
2 medium all-purpose apples, pared, cored, and finely chopped
1 can 14 oz. Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk
1 can 8 oz. Borden Sour Cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions and stir in the chopped apples.
3. Pour the mixture into a well-greased and floured 13x9 inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, sour cream, and Realemon juice.
6. Remove the cake from the oven and spread the cream mixture over the top.
7. Return the cake to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until set.
8. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
9. Cool and garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
